title: Account Settings
twoFactorDesc: Require an OTP code on every login
deleteWarning: This permanently deletes your account and all flashcard data.
deleteConfirmMessage: This action cannot be undone. All your decks, cards, and study history will be permanently deleted.
publicProfileDesc: Shown on your creator page and published decks
languageDesc: Choose the language for the app interface
signOutDesc: Sign out of your account on this device.
usernameDesc: Used in your public profile URL
phoneHint: Optional — used only for identity verification if required by law
twoFAEnabledDesc: A code is sent to your email on every login.
twoFADisabledDesc: Enable to require an email code on every login.
twoFACodePrompt: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it to confirm disabling 2FA.
deleteWarningDetail: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data — decks, cards, study history, and SRS progress. There is no way to recover this.
deleteReason: Why are you deleting your account?
deleteReasonPlaceholder: e.g. I no longer need this service…
paymentCancelledDesc: Your plan is still Free. No charge was made. You can upgrade anytime.
nowProDesc: Unlimited AI card generation is now active on your account.
error2FACode: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
errorPasswordsEmpty: Please enter and confirm your password.
errorReasonTooShort: Please provide a reason (at least 6 characters).
errorDeleteFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errorDeleteNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
